name: Chinese Pepper Steak Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pound Top round or sirloin steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat from the meat and cut into pencil-thin strips.
2. In a deep skillet or Dutch oven, heat oil, garlic, and salt over medium-high heat.
3. Add the meat and brown over high heat, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally with a fork.
4. Add the beef broth. Cover and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the meat is fork-tender.
5. Stir in the green pepper strips, celery, onions, and 1/2 cup of Coca-Cola. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Do not overcook; the vegetables should be tender-crisp.
6. Peel the tomatoes, cut into wedges, and gently stir into the meat.
7. Blend cornstarch with the 1/4 cup of Coca-Cola and soy sauce. Stir the mixture into the meat and cook until the sauce thickens, about 1 minute, stirring lightly with a fork.
8. Serve over hot rice. Makes 6 servings (3/4 cup each).
